tasks.title: Desktop WebView Integration
tasks.description: Implement actual WebView component for desktop mode per PRD 13. Currently desktop.rs only starts HTTP server and opens browser. FR-015 (Desktop/Web/ACP Interface) requires embedded WebView.
tasks.impl_notes: Added webview.rs module with wry-based WebView implementation. Modified desktop.rs to use embedded WebView when desktop feature is enabled. WebView loads local HTTP server URL.

tasks.title: Git Test Code Bugs
tasks.description: Fix 11 test compilation errors in crates/git: 8 duplicate test name definitions, missing use std::sync::atomic::Ordering import, missing next_port() helper function.
test_criteria: cargo test --package opencode-git passes without compilation errors
tasks.impl_notes: Add use std::sync::atomic::Ordering import. Define or remove next_port() helper. Fix duplicate test module at lines 405+ and 697+ in crates/git/src/gitlab_ci.rs

tasks.title: JSONC Error Messages Clarity
tasks.description: Improve JSONC error message formatting for better user understanding. FR-003 reference.
test_criteria: JSONC parsing errors show clear line/column information
tasks.impl_notes: Enhanced JsoncError to show source line with caret marker. Improved generate_context() with case-insensitive matching and more user-friendly hints. Updated with_file_path() to display error in clear format.

tasks.title: Circular Variable Expansion Detection
tasks.description: Add detection algorithm for circular references in variable expansion. FR-003 reference.
test_criteria: Circular variable references are detected and reported
Error message identifies the circular chain
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented circular detection with chain reporting in crates/core/src/config.rs. Changed visited HashSet to path Vec to track expansion chain. When cycle detected, error message shows full chain like '$a -> $b -> $a'. Tests pass for circular reference detection.

tasks.title: Deprecated Fields Removal
tasks.description: Remove deprecated fields from config: mode, tools, theme, keybinds. Note: Remove in major version (v4.0). FR-003 reference.
test_criteria: Deprecated fields no longer exist in Config struct
Config migration path exists for v4.0
test_commands: cargo check --package opencode-config 2>&1 | grep -i deprecate || echo 'No deprecation warnings'
tasks.impl_notes: Deferred for major version v4.0 - remove in crates/config

tasks.title: Multiline Input Terminal Support
tasks.description: Verify multiline input with Shift+Enter for new line works correctly in terminal. FR-018 reference.
test_criteria: Shift+Enter inserts newline in multiline input
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented - Shift+Enter handling added to App::handle_input in crates/tui/src/app.rs:2825

tasks.title: Session Sharing Between Interfaces
tasks.description: Implement cross-interface session synchronization for CLI, TUI, Web, Desktop modes. FR-015 reference.
test_criteria: Session state is synchronized between interfaces
Session can be resumed across different interface modes

tasks.title: Project VCS worktree root distinction
tasks.description: Distinguish between project root and VCS worktree root in crates/core.
test_criteria: VCS worktree root is correctly identified
Project root vs worktree root are properly distinguished
